_doc: Total polyphenol content (mg/100g) per USDA fdcId, merged into NutrientVector.polyphenol_mg and read by the FII (src/core/fii.ts). Source is the Phenol-Explorer database. THIS IS A SEED: the values below are approximate, transcribed from the canonical Phenol-Explorer publication (Pérez-Jiménez 2010) for the foods this archive's recipes use, and are flagged confidence<=medium pending the official bulk export. Replace this file wholesale by running `node scripts/build-phenol-explorer.mjs <export.csv>` once the registration-gated Phenol-Explorer export is downloaded. Foods absent here simply contribute no polyphenol term (the FII downgrades their confidence).
_source: Pérez-Jiménez J, Neveu V, Vos F, Scalbert A (2010). Identification of the 100 richest dietary sources of polyphenols. Eur J Clin Nutr 64:S112–S120 (Phenol-Explorer). Values are total polyphenols by Folin assay, approximate, pending official Phenol-Explorer export.

171413.source: Phenol-Explorer / Pérez-Jiménez 2010 (extra-virgin olive oil; our food is generic olive oil)
